info.name: Own Chatbot Agent
info.description: All APIs for the Own Chatbot Agent backend. Import this + the Environment file, select the 'Own Chatbot Agent - Local' environment, then run Login first to auto-save the token.

request.description: Register a new user. Token is auto-saved to environment variable 'token'. Change the email to a new one each time.
Login with existing account. email: test123@test.com / password: test123 already exists. Token is auto-saved to the 'token' environment variable.
Returns the currently logged-in user. Run Login first to get the token.
Returns all available business type templates (real_estate, saas, clinic, etc).

body.raw:
{
  "businessType": "saas",
  "projectName": "My Test Bot",
  "websiteUrl": "",
  "manualKnowledge": "We are a SaaS company. Pricing starts at $29/month for the Starter plan, $79/month for Pro. We offer a 14-day free trial. Contact us at support@example.com.",
  "mainGoal": "answer product questions and collect leads",
  "targetAudience": "website visitors",
  "tone": "friendly and professional",
  "capturesName": "yes",
  "capturesEmail": "yes",
  "capturesPhone": "no",
  "allowedTopics": "pricing, features, onboarding, support",
  "blockedTopics": "legal advice, medical diagnosis",
  "handoffReason": "when the bot is uncertain or the user requests a human"
}

request.description: Builds a chatbot profile from inputs. Leave websiteUrl empty to skip scraping and use manualKnowledge only. This does NOT store to DB — call Publish after this.

body.raw:
{
  "profile": {
    "projectName": "My Test Bot",
    "businessType": "SaaS",
    "websiteUrl": "",
    "manualKnowledge": "We are a SaaS company. Pricing starts at $29/month. 14-day free trial available.",
    "websiteTitle": "",
    "websiteSummary": "",
    "websitePages": [],
    "websiteSections": [],
    "websiteChunks": [],
    "websiteTopics": [],
    "tone": "friendly and professional",
    "goals": ["answer product questions", "qualify leads"],
    "targetAudience": "website visitors",
    "knowledgeSources": ["Manual knowledge: We are a SaaS company. Pricing starts at $29/month."],
    "leadCaptureFields": ["name", "email"],
    "handoffConditions": ["The bot is uncertain.", "User requests a human."],
    "allowedTopics": ["pricing", "features", "support"],
    "blockedTopics": ["legal advice", "medical diagnosis"],
    "prompt": "You are the AI chatbot for My Test Bot. Business type: SaaS. Tone: friendly and professional."
  }
}

request.description: Saves the bot to the database (data/app-db.json). The botId is auto-saved to environment.
Returns all published bots from the database.
Get a single bot by ID. Run Publish first to auto-save botId to environment.
Send a message to a published bot. The exchange is saved to messages in the database. Run Publish first.
Returns the JavaScript embed snippet to paste into any website.
